feat.name: Topple Foe
feat.text: You take advantage of the opening created by your ally to tip your foe off their feet. Attempt an Athletics check to Trip the target of the triggering attack.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: An ally succeeds at a melee Strike against an enemy you are both adjacent to.
